rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports.
Use implementation scopes for bindings and assignments that are valid in that context.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE contracts are placed in valid AADL scopes based on the visibility of ports and subcomponents.
Only include assumptions and guarantees that reference visible features or ports in component type annexes.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use valid AADL component names and port directions when defining assumptions and guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes unless they are valid in that scope.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE syntax and structure in general
